summary: Focused testing of 2 new features: PDF Viewer and Pagination. All 11 test cases PASSED. Both features fully functional.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF viewer and pagination fully tested and working. Documents page at RealCMB Group > TEST_UI Project. Document RCG_UIPROJ_001_PLA_00002 has test PDF uploaded. All toolbar buttons (sign, download, close, zoom in/out, page nav) work. Sidebar shows metadata and 'No signatures'. Sign button opens SignatureModal. Pagination shows '1-2 sur 2 résultats', page 1 highlighted blue, prev/next buttons disabled at boundaries.

pagination.next_disabled: PASS - disabled at last page (only 1 page)

pdf_viewer.eye_button_visible: PASS - 1 view-btn found on doc with file
pdf_viewer.eye_btn_absent_no_file: PASS - 2nd doc without file has no Eye button
pdf_viewer.pdf_renders: PASS - PDF page rendered with 'NumDocMan Test' text
pdf_viewer.toolbar_buttons: PASS - pdf-prev-page, pdf-next-page, pdf-zoom-in, pdf-zoom-out, pdf-sign-btn, pdf-download-btn, pdf-close-btn all found
pdf_viewer.sidebar_metadata: PASS - Shows doc ID, type, state, version, phase, created_by
pdf_viewer.close_btn: PASS - Modal closes on X click
